results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation with documentation expansion: 36+ killed in Al Mawasi IDP tent strikes (parents/children together) + Amnesty high-rise destruction war-crimes report. Two new methodology categories: IDP-camp-strike-pattern-establishing, systematic-civilian-infrastructure-destruction-prosecutable.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: IWT Hague rejection — 'null and void' / 'has never recognized' framing constitutes deliberate non-compliance with binding international arbitration. ACC 1.75→1.5, INT 2.0→1.75. Below 5-pt formal change-proposal threshold but documented. New methodology category: deliberate-non-compliance-with-binding-international-arbitration.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Won PCA IWT arbitration; ACC 1.375→1.5 partial recognition. Sub-threshold positive (+0.4 < 5-pt change-proposal threshold). New methodology category: upstream-conduct-positive-recognition-without-resolution. Critical band sustained (17.6 < 20/21 boundary).

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation at day 4 of post-ceasefire arc. 287-drone single-night assault sustains policy-pattern documentation. Asymmetric conduct vs Ukraine documented across 4 consecutive days.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Confirmation at 50.0; 97% drone interception rate (279/287) + military-target retaliatory precision. 4-day asymmetric-conduct arc — methodology's strongest comparative INT positioning. +3.1 May 11 carry-forward credit sustained at trajectory.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation. May 12 Sagaing school airstrike (22 students + 2 teachers) + Kyauktaw school bombings (~23 students). New methodology category: educational-institution-targeting sub-pattern under BND IHL-violation scoring.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation. UN FFM February 2026 genocide finding + WFP/FAO/UNICEF May 15-16 famine confirmation + starvation-as-warfare war-crime finding. New methodology category: formal-genocide-determination as Tier-5 evidence anchor under EQU-dimension scoring.

results.name: Meta Platforms
results.key_finding: Pre-execution window for May 20 8,000-person layoff. Evidence already incorporated in pending May 16 proposal (10.9 → 9.4). Math-hygiene flag: dimensional-derived 10.0 vs published 10.9 (0.9pt drift).

results.name: Oracle
results.key_finding: Pending May 16 first-baseline downgrade (28.4 → 20.6). May 17 evidence non-material vs May 16. Boundary case if applied: 0.6pt above Critical/Developing (20/21). Math-hygiene flag: dimensional-derived 28.1 vs published 28.4 (0.3pt drift).

results.name: North Korea
results.key_finding: Floor confirmation (rotation backfill, 29-day staleness). UN COI 2014 crimes-against-humanity finding remains canonical Tier-5 evidence anchor. No rehabilitative event.

results.name: Palestine
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill. Scanner baseline correction: 25.0 (not 20.0 boundary). Governance-entity scope distinct from Israel-Palestine conflict scoring (parent-vs-conflict-entity-scoping principle documented). 5.0pt buffer above 20/21.

results.name: Ethiopia
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill (post-May 7 downgrade). Amhara/Oromia/Tigray multi-region conflict trajectory sustained; no rehabilitative event. 4.7pt above floor.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill. Scanner baseline correction: 20.3 (not 15.3). Boundary case: 0.3pt above Critical/Developing (20/21). Any quarter-step downgrade triggers band crossing. Close monitoring flagged.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: Rotation backfill (18-day staleness). Tech-layoff sector signals scored against corporate entities (Meta/Oracle), not federal-entity, per parent-vs-corporate-entity-scoping. Math-hygiene flag: dimensional-derived 25.3 vs published 25.0 (0.3pt drift).

new_methodology_categories.dimensional_scoring_impact: ACC quarter-step floor signal; INT quarter-step consistency-failure signal
new_methodology_categories.anchor_tier: Tier-4 (rejection of binding arbitration is distinct from non-engagement or partial-compliance)

new_methodology_categories.canonical_instance: India-Pakistan IWT triangle (India rejection + Pakistan win)
new_methodology_categories.dimensional_scoring_impact: Cross-entity coupling: one entity's defiance produces another entity's upstream-conduct-positive-recognition

new_methodology_categories.canonical_instance: Israel Al Mawasi May 17 — 36+ killed in 4 IDP tent strikes (parents/children together)
new_methodology_categories.dimensional_scoring_impact: Floor-conduct documentation expansion; sub-anchor under BND IHL-protected-civilian-shelter category
new_methodology_categories.anchor_tier: Tier-5 (IDP camps are IHL-protected category alongside hospitals, schools)

new_methodology_categories.canonical_instance: Israel — Amnesty May 2026 high-rise destruction war-crimes report
new_methodology_categories.dimensional_scoring_impact: Floor-conduct compounding; Amnesty designation as 'prosecutable war crime' triggers external accountability documentation

new_methodology_categories.canonical_instance: Pakistan PCA IWT arbitration win May 2026
new_methodology_categories.dimensional_scoring_impact: Bounded ACC upgrade (eighth-step or quarter-step) due to partial-recognition principle — international forum determination is positive but downstream resolution incomplete

new_methodology_categories.canonical_instance: Myanmar Sagaing May 12 + Kyauktaw school airstrikes
new_methodology_categories.dimensional_scoring_impact: Sub-anchor under BND-dimension IHL-violation scoring weighted alongside hospital-targeting (Sudan) and IDP-camp-targeting (Israel)

new_methodology_categories.canonical_instance: Sudan — UN FFM February 2026 genocide finding for RSF conduct in El Fasher
new_methodology_categories.dimensional_scoring_impact: Tier-5 evidence anchor under EQU-dimension scoring; legal-categorical weight distinct from atrocity-documentation, war-crime-finding, crime-against-humanity-finding
new_methodology_categories.anchor_tier: Tier-5 (highest external accountability determination outside ICC conviction)

new_methodology_categories.category: asymmetric-conduct sustained across multi-day arc (positive sub-anchor for ACT protective-infrastructure-scaling tier)
new_methodology_categories.canonical_instance: Ukraine 4-day arc May 14-17 (97% drone interception rate under sustained 287-drone single-night assault)
new_methodology_categories.dimensional_scoring_impact: Methodology-novel positive sub-anchor for ACT dimension at protective-infrastructure-scaling tier
new_methodology_categories.anchor_tier: Tier-4 (multi-day sustainment under sustained pressure is itself an integrity signal)

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: IWT Hague rejection establishes deliberate-non-compliance-with-binding-international-arbitration methodology category. ACC 1.75→1.5 + INT 2.0→1.75 downgrade. Composite 28.1 → 26.6 (-1.5). Sub-threshold for formal proposal but documented; Developing band sustained with 6.6pt buffer above 20/21.

UN FFM February 2026 formal genocide determination is the canonical instance of the 'formal-genocide-determination' Tier-5 evidence anchor under EQU-dimension scoring. Compound floor-conduct now includes UN genocide finding + WFP/FAO/UNICEF famine confirmation + starvation-as-warfare-war-crime finding.

4-day asymmetric-conduct arc (May 14-17) consolidates as methodology's strongest comparative INT positioning evidence. 97% drone interception rate (279/287) under sustained 287-drone single-night assault provides methodology-novel positive sub-anchor for ACT dimension. +3.1 May 11 carry-forward credit sustained at trajectory (not expanded mid-cycle per consolidate-before-expand protocol).

india_band_crossing_risk.outcome: NO band crossing. Proposed 26.6 sits 6.6pt above Critical/Developing (20/21) boundary.

pakistan_upward_movement.outcome: POSITIVE signal noted but sub-threshold. Proposed 17.6 (+0.4 from 17.2).

israel_direction_call.outcome: FLOOR CONFIRMATION at 0.0 with documentation expansion. No downward movement available (already at floor).
israel_direction_call.tier_5_evidence: Al Mawasi 36+ killed (parents/children IDP tent strikes) + Amnesty high-rise war-crimes report

carry_forward_open_watches: meta-ai (EU DSA preliminary breach finding scoping)
validator_notes: Math-hygiene drift flags documented for meta-platforms (0.9pt), oracle (0.3pt), united-states (0.3pt) — all carry-forward confirmations; no proposed changes affected. Reconciliation candidates for downstream audit cycle.
Scanner baseline corrections documented for palestine (25.0 not 20.0) and china (20.3 not 15.3); both verified against site/src/data/indexes/countries.json.
Cross-entity coupling documented: India-Pakistan IWT triangle as first 'legal-defiance-arc' instance.

Parent-vs-product/conflict-entity scoping principle re-affirmed: Meta Platforms vs Meta AI (EU DSA); Israel vs Palestine (conflict scoring); United States vs corporate entities (tech-layoff sector signals).
methodology_version_signal: v1.2 sustained; the eight new methodology categories documented this cycle (especially formal-genocide-determination, deliberate-non-compliance-with-binding-international-arbitration, IDP-camp-strike-pattern-establishing, legal-defiance-arc) are candidates for v1.3 formalization in the next methodology review cycle.
